requirement: Source London rental yield history by area — investment thesis validation

sources_used.source: ONS IPHRP — Index of Private Housing Rental Prices
sources_used.result: SUCCESS — 229 monthly entries extracted from Table 1

sources_used.data: Jan-2015 London avg rent £1,392/mo, avg price £477,197
sources_used.result: SUCCESS — anchor for IPHRP index → absolute rent conversion

sources_used.source: Land Registry Average Prices by LA
sources_used.data: Monthly London borough prices for yield denominator
sources_used.result: SUCCESS — used for avg_price_gbp in london_wide series

sources_used.data: Per-property price/sqft → £psqm for by-area yield derivation
sources_used.result: SUCCESS — 14 distinct areas with 1–5 comparables each

what_now_in_macro_trend.london_wide: 109 monthly rows (2015-01 to 2024-01), each with: london_rental_idx, avg_price_gbp, estimated_monthly_rent, gross_yield_pct, net_yield_pct
what_now_in_macro_trend.london_idx: 229 monthly rows (2005-01 to 2024-01), raw IPHRP index
what_now_in_macro_trend.by_area: 14 London areas with gross/net yields, est_rent_psm, est_price_psm, premium_vs_london, n_comparables
what_now_in_macro_trend.yield_vs_gilt: Qualitative note on yield spread vs 5yr gilt (~4.5% Apr 2026)

by_area_summary.Islington (N7): gross=3.74% net=2.99%  £psqm=7,473   prem=-4%   n=2 ← best yield
by_area_summary.Islington (N1): gross=2.74% net=2.19%  £psqm=10,830  prem=+2%   n=2 ← compressed yield

data_quality.london_wide_series: MEDIUM-HIGH — anchored to ONS IPHRP index (official), BoE/ONS benchmark rent (authoritative), Land Registry prices (official). Monthly.

gaps: IPHRP data ends Jan 2024 — no 2024-2026 data yet (ONS publishes with ~2 month lag)
By-area IPHRP breakdown not available at London borough level from ONS — using DB comparables + area premium instead
Yield vs gilt note is qualitative — could be enriched with actual gilt time series
recommendation: DAT-180 is RESOLVED. ONS IPHRP extends to Jan 2024. Refresh IPHRP XLSX quarterly (Feb/May/Aug/Nov). For current yields, cross-reference Rightmove Rental Price Tracker. by-area yields from DB comparables are functional but improve with more comparables per area.
